examples.title: Basic Class Definition and Usage
examples.description: Demonstrates basic class structure with data members and member functions
examples.explanation: Shows class with private data members, constructor initialization, and member function usage

examples.title: Copy Constructor Demonstration
examples.description: Shows implementation and usage of copy constructor
examples.explanation: Demonstrates how copy constructor creates a new object as a copy of existing object

examples.title: Static Members Example
examples.description: Demonstrates static data and member functions
examples.explanation: Shows static members belonging to class rather than individual objects

examples.title: Friend Function Example
examples.description: Shows friend function accessing private members
examples.explanation: Demonstrates how friend function can access private members without being a member

examples.title: Const Member Function Example
examples.description: Shows usage of const keyword with member functions
examples.explanation: Const member functions ensure data integrity by preventing modification of object state
